productName: Fugu - T1 - Hash Rosin - Xeno Punch - (DOH) - 1g
description: Double-refined hybrid hash rosin from Xeno Punch — washed, sifted, and cold-pressed with zero solvents, sitting right at the peak of the solventless pyramid. The cleanest expression of the strain — a sweet mixed-fruit punch flavor, with a versatile, anytime balance.
